patch.value: Address pre-existing extension/SDK issues surfaced by PR #69 review (CodeRabbit)

PR #69 was a pure barrel-split + error-surfacing change; CodeRabbit/Gemini reviewed the relocated code and surfaced PRE-EXISTING issues (all present on main before the split). PR #69 fixed the contained high-value ones (describeHandlerError non-Error objects; GitHub subpath path-traversal guard; reject ./.. managed dir names; bare Windows pm.cmd/pm.exe detection; missing health/validate schema props skipVectors/skipIntegrity/skipDrift/verboseDiagnostics). REMAINING (deferred to keep that PR focused; behavior-changing or contract-test-affecting): (1) src/cli/commands/extension/doctor.ts ~L147: package-vocabulary remediation commands generate 'pm package install'/'pm package adopt-all' but resolveAction() only accepts bare package targets for doctor/reload/catalog/init/explore/manage/list — remediation points users at erroring commands. (2) src/cli/commands/extension/install-sources.ts ~L194: cwd-relative npm specs like 'npm:packages/foo' fall through to npm pack as registry specs even when the dir exists locally; treat existing cwd-relative dirs as local. (3) src/cli/commands/extension/managed-state.ts ~L207: on schema/parse/read failure returns createEmptyManagedExtensionState() which install/manage/adopt then upsert+write, silently dropping all previously-managed entries after a transient read error; surface a hard failure or a non-persistable error state. (4) src/cli/commands/extension/scaffold.ts ~L189: writes scaffold files as it goes and only fails on first conflict, leaving partial package.json/extensions/ on EXIT_CODE.CONFLICT; do a read-only preflight conflict pass then write all-or-nothing. (5) src/sdk/cli-contracts/tool-option-contracts.ts L134: allowAuditUpdate sits in TOOL_CREATE_OPTION_CONTRACTS but the --allow-audit-update flag belongs to the update family; generated create schema accepts an unintended field and update schema rejects a valid one — move it to TOOL_UPDATE_OPTION_CONTRACTS and re-verify contract tests. Each needs regression tests.

author: codex
message: Continue PR #69 reviewer fixes; implementing remaining valid CodeRabbit threads from live review data.

value.note: Use valid flag-form package remediation commands

Hard-fail invalid or unreadable managed state before mutation
Preflight scaffold conflicts before write phase
Move allowAuditUpdate to update action contracts
Regression coverage for allowAuditUpdate schema placement
Regression coverage for package remediation,local npm specs,managed state failure,and scaffold preflight

value.text: Evidence: addressed remaining live PR #69 reviewer threads: package doctor remediation now uses flag-form commands, cwd-relative npm package specs resolve locally when present, invalid managed state hard-fails before mutation, scaffold writes are preflighted, and allowAuditUpdate moved to update schemas. Verification passed: pnpm build; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/extension-command.spec.ts tests/unit/contracts-command.spec.ts; pm test pm-ll50 --run --progress; node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage; pnpm changelog:pm:check; pnpm quality:static; pnpm quality:docs-skills; pnpm typecheck.

patch.value: All remaining valid PR #69 reviewer threads implemented with regression coverage and full gates passing.

Package remediation text, npm path resolution, managed-state safety, scaffold conflict handling, and update action schema contracts match the current CLI behavior.

Package doctor remediation uses flag-form commands, existing cwd-relative npm specs resolve as local packages, invalid managed state fails before mutation, scaffold conflicts are preflighted, and allowAuditUpdate is only in update-family schemas.
